acholi.the_earliest_fraction_notation_dates_t: Lanyut me bute mukwongo obeddo ki i Ejipt macon macalo mwaka 1800 BCE. Jo Ejipt gutiyo ki "bute me unit" — bute ma namba malo obeddo 1 keken (macalo 1/2, 1/3, 1/4). Gucoyo bute mo keken macalo cokke me bute me unit: 2/5 = 1/3 + 1/15. Lanyut me bar me kombeddi (namba malo i wi namba piny) a ki i lu-matematik me Arab me dyere macalo mwaka 1200 CE.
acholi.where_do_the_fraction_words_come_from: Nyig lok me bute a ki kwene?
acholi.numerator_comes_from_the_latin_numerar: "Numerator" a ki i Latin "numerare" (kwano) — kwano bute adi. "Denominator" a ki i "denominare" (cako nying) — cako dit me bute. Kacel: namba piny cako kit me bute; namba malo kwano bute adi me meno ma itye kwede.
acholi.decimals_as_we_know_them_were_populari: Decimal kit ma wangeyo kwede Simon Stevin oketo gucaŋŋe i 1585 i buk mere "De Thiende" (Me Apar). Ma peya meno, bute keken obeddo yo me nyuto namba ma pe pong. Cukcuk me decimal odoko me lobo weng i mwaka 1700 keken.
acholi.percent_comes_from_the_latin_per_centu: "Percent" a ki i Latin "per centum" — "i mia acel." Pi meno 25% te lok 25 i 100, onyo 25/100. Lanyut me % oa ki i cukcuk me "per c." i coc me cato wil me Italy me mwaka 100 me apar wiye abic.
acholi.the_reciprocal_of_a_b_is_b_a_flip_it_u: Reciprocal me a/b obeddo b/a — lokke malo-piny. Bute mo keken ma pe zero tye ki reciprocal. Anyim me bute ki reciprocal mere obeddo 1 kare ducu: (3/4) × (4/3) = 12/12 = 1. Man obeddo mumiyo poko ki bute rom ki anyim ki reciprocal mere.
acholi.why_is_1_2_the_most_used_fraction: Piŋo 1/2 obeddo bute ma gitiyo kwede loyo?
acholi.1_2_is_the_most_common_fraction_in_eve: 1/2 obeddo bute ma nen loyo i lok me nino ki nino pien tye i dyere atir me 0 ki 1. Bene obeddo bute keken ma waco ki lok: "nucu" pe "acel i wi aryo." Leb mukene bene tye ki nyig lok mapat pi 1/3 ki 1/4 (bute adek, bute angwen).
acholi.a_pizza_is_a_perfect_fraction_model_be: Pizza obeddo model me bute atir pien obeddo cil (pi meno bute weng a ki i cwiny), bute yot me kwano, ki model rwatte ki tir me matematik: bute n/d obeddo n bute marom i kin bute weng d marom.
acholi.some_numbers_like_and_2_cannot_be_writ: Namba mogo, macalo π ki √2, pe twero coyo macalo bute me namba aryo mupong. Man gilwoŋo namba ma pe tye ki tir. Jo Pythagoras (macalo 500 BCE) giwaco ni gineko lu-matematik Hippasus i kare ma onyuto ni √2 pe twero coyo macalo bute.
acholi.any_real_number_can_be_written_as_a_co: Namba ada mo keken twero coyo macalo "bute ma medde" — bute ma tye iye macalo 1 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + ...))). Man miyo pim me bute maber loyo. π ≈ 22/7 ki i nyig lok manok mukwongo; maber loyo obeddo 355/113.
acholi.musical_pitch_ratios_are_fractions_the: Pim me dwaan me wer obeddo bute. Octave obeddo pim me 2:1 (frequency medde tyen aryo). Me abic atir obeddo 3:2. Me adek madit obeddo 5:4. Pythagoras onongo ni pim me namba mupong ma yot cweyo dwaan ma rwatte.
acholi.two_pizzas_can_only_be_combined_if_the: Pizza aryo twero riyo keken ka ngolo i bute me dit acel-lu. Namba piny mapatpat = bute me dit mapatpat = pe twero riyo atir. Namba piny marom te lok atir "bute me dit acel-lu."
acholi.a_batting_average_like_333_means_1_3_o: Average me goyo macalo .333 te lok 1/3 me goyo miyo goyo. ERA me lacwal, percent me bedo-i-base, percent me goyo — weng obeddo bute. Baseball obeddo tuk mukwongo ma ocaŋo kit me tam me statistik man, cakke i mwaka 1850.
acholi.georges_cuisenaire_was_a_belgian_prima: Georges Cuisenaire obeddo lapwony me primary me Belgium i mwaka 1950 ma ocweyo odoo ma tye ki rangi ki bor 1 nio 10 me konyo lutino mako kube me namba kacel ki bute. "Kor ot me bute" ma ineno i klas mapol obeddo latin me dijital me odoo mere ma tye ada.
acholi.the_chinese_mathematical_text_nine_cha: Coc me matematik me Cayina "Dul Ojiŋ i wi Lonyo me Matematik" (macalo 100 BCE) onongo tye ki kwano me bute, kacel ki yoo me yenyo namba piny marom ma rwatte i matematik ki ngo ma wapwonyo tin.
acholi.computers_store_decimal_fractions_in_b: Kombiwuta gikano bute me decimal i binary. Decimal 0.1 pe twero nyuto atir i binary — odoko bute ma dwogo i base 2. Man mumiyo 0.1 + 0.2 miyo 0.30000000000000004 kare mogo i leb me programming.

acholi.let_your_number_be_n_the_sequence_n_1_: Wek namba mamegi obed n. Lubbe: (n+1) × 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n + 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n. Pok ki 2 → n. Golo acakki → 0. Kur — meno miyo 0, pe 1. Tem: n → (n+1)×2 = 2n+2 → +4 = 2n+6 → −6 = 2n → ÷2 = n → −acakki = 0. "Ilim" ojeny i constant ma okano i lubbe.
acholi.each_term_is_half_the_previous_the_tot: Nyig lok acel acel obeddo nucu me mukato. Cokke cok bot 1 ento pe oo iye matwal. Man obeddo lubbe me geometric me agikki-pe ki nyig lok mukwongo 1/2 ki pim 1/2: S = (1/2) / (1 − 1/2) = 1. Man mumiyo paradox me wot pa Zeno twero yubbe i matematik.
acholi.even_though_each_term_is_small_the_ser: Kadi bed nyig lok acel acel tidi, lubbe kayo. Me kato 100, imito macalo 1.5 × 10^43 nyig lok. Man Nicole Oresme onyuto i mwaka 1300 ki tic me coko: 1/3 + 1/4 > 1/4 + 1/4 = 1/2; 1/5+...+1/8 > 4 × 1/8 = 1/2; itwero yeny 1/2 mukene me medo kare ducu.
acholi.check_1_4_and_1_3_4_1_1_3_1_check_2_5_: Rot 1/4 ki 1/3: (4)(1) − (1)(3) = 1. Rot 2/5 ki 1/2: (5)(1) − (2)(2) = 1. Kit man cweyo yat me Stern-Brocot me namba weng me rational.
acholi.rewrite_1_2_2_3_3_4_n_1_n_the_2_in_2_3: Coo doki: 1/2 × 2/3 × 3/4 × ... × (n−1)/n. 2 i 2/3 jwaa 2 i namba piny me 1/2. 3 i 3/4 jwaa 3 i namba piny me 2/3. Gin weng jwaa woko keken 1/n.
acholi.mathematical_tricks_that_are_really_el: "Yoo me ilim" me matematik ma i ada obeddo identity me bute maber. Yer acel me neno yubbe, nyuto, ki tir me matematik.
